OE-Encoder Dataset Visualizer

5 datasets · random samples · hover a bounding box to highlight its label
DeepFashion2   224,114 samples in full dataset
Clothing images with per-garment bounding boxes, category names, dense landmarks, segmentation masks, style and consumer-to-shop pair IDs. Showing train split annotations only.
13 GB · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/deepfashion2

LogoDet-3K   158,652 samples in full dataset
Logo detection: 3K brand classes across 9 industry categories with bounding boxes. Stored as parquet shards (train + test).
3 GB · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/logodet3k

VisualNews   1,259,732 samples in full dataset
News images paired with captions from BBC, Guardian, USA Today, and Washington Post. Each sample also has the linked article text on disk.
96 GB · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/visualnews/extracted/origin

Herbarium 2020 (FGVC7)   1,030,747 samples in full dataset
Herbarium 2020 from the Fine-Grained Visual Categorization challenge. Each plant specimen image is labeled with its scientific name, family and genus from a flat taxonomy (32,094 species).
257 MB metadata + ~60 GB images · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/herbarium/fgvc7/extracted/nybg2020

BioTrove-Train   134,596,310 samples in full dataset
Large-scale biodiversity images from iNaturalist research-grade observations: 7 taxonomic groups (Aves, Arachnida, Insecta, Plantae, Fungi, Mollusca, Reptilia), 33K species. Each image is keyed by iNat photo_id and joins back to a full Linnaean taxonomy from the BGLab/BioTrove-Train parquet shards.
14 TB images + 3.5 GB metadata · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/biotrove

Open Food Facts   1,180,660 samples in full dataset
Food-product images linked by barcode to rich text labels (product name, brand, ingredients, categorical taxonomy, Nutri-Score, NOVA processing group, allergens, etc.). 400 px resized variants only.
26 GB images + 12 GB metadata (gz) · /weka/oe-training-default/oe-encoder/openfoodfacts
